reason: Agent successfully opened a browser, navigated to https://example.com, retrieved the page title "Example Domain", and reported it back in the response.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with title "Gamut" showing the agent dashboard.
Found and clicked the "QA-20260626-004453-7inf" agent in the sidebar — Successfully opened the agent configuration page.
Clicked on the message input field — The textbox became active and ready for input.
Typed the message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message appeared in the input field correctly.
Sent the message using Ctrl+Enter — Message was sent and the page navigated to a new session view showing the agent processing the request.
Waited for the agent to complete processing (up to 3 minutes) — Agent completed all task steps within 10 seconds.
Verified the response mentions "Example Domain" — The agent's response clearly stated: "The page at https://example.com loaded successfully, and its title is "Example Domain"."
